'''Lijuter''' was the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was located near [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].

==History==
In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3678 BBY]], [[Skadge]] was born on Lijuter.<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
During the [[Galactic War]], a mass exodus transpired on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where several [[Houk/Legends|Houks]] left their homeworld to travel to [[Phorliss]].<ref name="Voyage">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Investigation|Voyage to Phorliss}}</ref>

Under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], a research station on the second [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of Lijuter was the site of Imperial experiments which attempted to turn Houk subjects into "perfect [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]."

{{Planet-stub}}
